title: Verify existing implementation of role hierarchy checker
description: The hasPermission(userRole, requiredRole) function already exists in src/auth/role-hierarchy.ts with hierarchy admin > editor > viewer > guest. All 18 tests pass in src/auth/role-hierarchy.test.ts, covering: role hierarchy (higher roles access lower roles), same-role access, and unknown role handling.
existing_patterns: src/auth/role-hierarchy.ts:undefined check for unknown roles returns false
